channel.title: IESET updates
channel.description: Public methodology, integrity, and corpus-status notes for the IESET framework.

item.title: Public surface scrub + legitimacy plumbing
item.description: Private operator automation removed from the public repository. Hypothesis pages deep-link the first spec commit (not HEAD). Added /production, robots/sitemap/llms.txt, and stats.json.

item.title: Corpus census and registration labels
item.description: Machine-readable public_corpus_census.json is the authoritative count source. legacy_same_commit rows remain inspectable without verified pre-registration credit.

item.title: Framework launch
item.description: Initial public release of the pre-registration-first hypothesis library, axis vocabulary, and scoreboard.
